description: Log into Moodle as an administrator (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and navigate to the 'Annual Compliance Training' course. Add a new 'SCORM package' activity to the course named exactly 'Mandatory Compliance Module'. Upload the SCORM package located at /home/ga/Documents/golf_scorm12.zip into the activity. CRITICAL: In the activity settings under 'Attempts management', you must set 'Force new attempt' to 'Yes' so yearly renewals track correctly. Save and return to the course.
